# Grace-Mar Record — Agent Manifest

User: xavier
Checksum: 626adc1fc7158f326e328bc0a296d4fdacdb591c9eb7e4bc44a7831a30d37633
Generated: 2026-03-23T09:15:50.894107
Runtime mode: adjunct_runtime

## Readable
Agents may read (for personalization, session continuity):

  - SELF/identity
  - SELF/preferences
  - SELF/linguistic_style
  - SELF/personality
  - SELF/interests
  - SELF/values
  - SELF/reasoning
  - SELF/narrative
  - SELF/IX-A
  - SELF/IX-B
  - SELF/IX-C
  - SKILLS/THINK
  - SKILLS/WRITE
  - WORK/context
  - EVIDENCE/activity_log
  - EVIDENCE/writing_log
  - EVIDENCE/creation_log
  - LIBRARY/entries
  - INTENT/goals
  - INTENT/tradeoff_rules

## Writable
Agents may stage candidates only. Merge requires user approval.

  - RECURSION-GATE/candidates

## Lanes

  - record: canonical
  - runtime: non-canonical
  - audit: non-canonical
  - policy: non-canonical

## Exports

  user.md: python scripts/export_user_identity.py -u xavier
  manifest: python scripts/export_manifest.py -u xavier
  fork_json: python scripts/export_fork.py -o fork-export.json
  intent_snapshot: python scripts/export_intent_snapshot.py -u xavier
  runtime_bundle: python scripts/export_runtime_bundle.py -u xavier --mode adjunct_runtime
